data.name: Insexsity
data.detailed_description:
Game is oriented for adult people.
In reason it's heavy one and bad sex style.
But if you are adult who found yourself scrolling porn pages - welcome:

"Wake up, Kate, wake up" (c)

Following her dreams, a young girl moves to a big city.

Kate is working in a massage parlor and new day is coming, it's time to rush to work. Renting an apartment, she has her own responsibilities, but this does not stop her from going to a club, to the gym, or going to the store and buying new clothes, or she can go to the cinema or maybe a library. She is free to go.

Meeting new people on the way, one day she go to where she had never been and could not even think about.

The game contains scenes of crime, violence and sex.

Haircuts types: 

Some clothes in the shop:

SPOILER

Characters can get into sex scenes with others. Depending on the type of work and places of stay in the game world, main character may be involved in various heterosexual and lesbian scenes.

data.short_description: Following her dreams, a young girl moves to a big city.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 丹麥文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 法文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 7/10/11
  • 處理器: Core i3
  • 記憶體: 1000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 680 / Radeon 270
  • 儲存空間: 1800 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.8
  • 處理器: Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Standard
  • 儲存空間: 1800 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Almost any 64bit Linux
  • 處理器: Core i3
  • 記憶體: 1000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Standard
  • 儲存空間: 1800 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard
